name: loophony
description: Codex App control plane, durable Onyx/OpenSearch memory, and setup workflows for Loophony.

interface.shortDescription: Set up, monitor, and steer a local Loophony daemon.
interface.longDescription: Use Codex App as the operator console for Loophony, search durable cross-session evidence through Onyx v4 and OpenSearch 3.6, create Linear project goals, inspect daemon state, submit operator input, and resolve scheduled human review gates.
defaultPrompt: Create the main Loophony goal in my Linear project.
Show the current Loophony daemon report.
What decisions and failures occurred across recent Loophony sessions?
